title: microchilus unicornis
intro: Microchilus unicornis, also known as Unicorn Flower or Unicorn Root, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, Microchilus unicornis has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been shown to have immunomodulatory and anti-cancer effects. Microchilus unicornis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal purposes, and it has also been used in traditional herbal preparations such as tonics and tinctures.
